creator: lkoeller@cc.fh-lippe.de
text:
Update of jpilot port from 0.93.1 to 0.95.
	The author send me the sources for checking a few days before the
	offical release!

Fix: Apply the two patches.

! DISTNAME=	jpilot-0.93.1
! PKGNAME=	jpilot-0.9.3.1
  CATEGORIES=	palm comms tk80
  MASTER_SITES=	http://jpilot.linuxbox.com/

--- 5,12 ----
